# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-service
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-service
        image: my-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
          name: http
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: excluded-service
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: excluded-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: excluded-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: excluded-service
        image: excluded-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
          name: http
